pages.title: Honey N Venom (Rude Wine Riddim)
pages.tagline: Taste the sweet before it stings.

pages.body: This high-octane Dancehall anthem juxtaposes seductive allure with dangerous toxicity. Driven by a sharp Afro-Caribbean riddim at blistering speed, the track features chest-rattling overdriven 808s and piercing siren FX. Sultry female vocals trade rapid-fire call-and-response toasts against raw male delivery, painting a picture of lovers who are as sweet as honey but lethal like venom. It captures the gritty, sweaty energy of a peak-time club night where physical desire clashes with emotional peril under strobe lights.
pages.styleSentence: A peak-time club anthem driven by a sharp Afro-Caribbean riddim at high tempo featuring chest-rattling overdriven 808s, siren FX, and rapid-fire call-and-response toasting between a sultry female lead and raw male vocals.

pages.text:
[Intro - Female, Sultry]

Mm-mm...
You look sweet from far away...
Till you get a taste...

[Drop]

Honey n venom...
Honey n venom...

[Chorus - Female]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Kiss me deep while you grind for a while
Honey n venom, got me losing my head
Both hands on my waist, got me wild in your bed

Honey n venom, pressing in the strobe light
Heart says more while my dress riding up high
Honey n venom, everybody can tell
You look like heaven but we f**king like hell

[Post-Chorus]

Ay-ay-ay-ay
Honey n venom
Ay-ay-ay-ay
Honey n venom

[Verse 1 - Male Toasting]

She walk in slow motion
Whole room freeze up
Gold in the smile
But the lips say "deeper"

Body got rhythm
Skin like silk
Sweet when she whining on the waistline milk

But mi know
Fire burning in the sugar
Pretty little waist
Turn a king to a lover

One minute halo
Next minute torn
Everybody know she wicked
Still everybody swarm

[Pre-Chorus - Female]

I know...
I know...
But I still come close

I know...
I know...
Still dancing with ghosts

[Chorus - Female]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Kiss me deep while you grind for a while
Honey n venom, got me losing my head
Both hands on my waist, got me wild in your bed

Honey n venom, pressing in the strobe light
Heart says more while my dress riding up high
Honey n venom, everybody can tell
You look like heaven but we f**king like hell

[Dancehall Breakdown]

Wine slow...
Don't stop...
Hands high...
Bass drop...

Wine low...
Tick-tock...
Honey n venom...
Bass knock...

[Verse 2 - Male & Female Back-and-Forth]

(Male)
You got the sugar

(Female)
You want the taste

(Male)
Bend pon the speaker

(Female)
Hands on my waist

(Male)
One more whine

(Female)
One more night

(Both)
Then we do it in the dark and the neon light

(Male)
Grab pon the bumper

(Female)
Grip on the thigh

(Male)
Why you always make me misbehave?

(Female)
'Cause you love when I ride

(Male)
Dangerous gyal

(Female)
Dangerous boy

(Male)
Why you always playing with fire?

(Female)
Because the burn feels good

[Big Chorus - Female Lead + Crowd]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Whole dancehall shouting every dirty line
Honey n venom, hands up to the sky
If loving you is wrong then I still wanna try

Honey n venom, rhythm in my veins
Everybody sweating in the tropical rain
Honey n venom, one more time before dawn
Sweet little poison got the whole world on

[Outro]

Ay-ay-ay-ay...
Honey n venom...

Ay-ay-ay-ay...
Honey n venom...

Sweet like honey...
Sharp like danger...

Honey...
N venom...

pages.vocalStyle: Aggressive, teasing, explicit delivery with rapid back-and-forth rap-singing

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sets the sultry tone for every drop.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers depth behind the main vocal hook.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking hard and fast.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds sharp, rhythmic accents to the mix.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric textures through the beat.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Sprinkles gritty grit over the whole vibe.
